description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adnrv/texlive:adnamc Docker image and runs on runners tagged with docker. Define the variables DIRE as example and FILE as test. Add a build job (default stage) that changes directory to $DIRE, runs latexmk -pdf -pdflatex="pdflatex --shell-escape %O %S" $FILE, moves the generated $FILE.pdf to the project root, and stores $FILE.pdf as an artifact. The job should use the docker tag and publish the PDF artifact.
